title: VimFu — zv View Cursor Line
description: zv opens just enough folds to make the cursor line visible. Useful when you jump to a line buried in folds.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with nested code
Launch nvim with indent folds, line numbers, all folds closed

steps.say: Z V opens just enough folds to make the cursor line visible. Jump anywhere and Z V reveals it.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump into a fold and reveal ---

steps.say: Everything is folded. Jump to line three. It's inside the Quest class.
The cursor is on the fold. Z V to reveal the line.
Line three is now visible. Only the folds around it opened.

steps.comment: --- Demo 2: jump to another hidden line ---

steps.say: Jump to line fifteen. It's inside the Tavern class.
Both sections visible now. Z V opens the minimum number of folds.
Z V. View cursor line. Jump to any line number and Z V makes it visible.
